---
title: "Results"
---


## Causal Graph Structure

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| label: fig-dag
#| fig-cap: "Causal Graph Structure recovered by the FCI algorithm with Fisher-Z Independence Test & Simple Imputation."
import os
from IPython.display import Image, display

graph_path = os.path.join("..", "graphs", "v3", "FCI_fisherz_simple.png")
display(Image(filename=graph_path))
```

The causal discovery algorithm recovered the structure shown in @fig-dag.
